decisions.rationale: Self-contained and directly asks what to do if OTP is not received in the Postal Vote BD app.
Clearly asks how to request OTP again after not receiving it in the Postal Vote app.
Fits the tag by asking how to proceed when OTP does not reach the user in the EC Postal Vote BD app.
Directly about a 6-digit OTP not arriving in the Postal Vote BD app and seeking a solution.
Verification code is an OTP-equivalent; the question asks what to do if it does not arrive in the app.
Self-contained question about repeated failure to receive OTP in the Postal Vote BD app.
Asks about alternatives when OTP is not received/sent in Postal Vote BD, matching the tag intent.
Verification code not received in Postal Vote BD is the same user issue as OTP not received.
Natural, self-contained question stating OTP is not coming in the Postal Vote app and asking what to do.
Asks when to retry after not receiving OTP in Postal Voting BD, within the not-received OTP flow.
Despite minor wording awkwardness, it clearly asks what steps to take if the OTP code does not arrive.
Directly concerns an OTP message not arriving in Postal Vote BD and whether to wait.
One-time code is an OTP synonym; the question asks how to request it again if not received.
Clearly asks how long to wait before requesting OTP again when it does not arrive.
Confirmation code not arriving in Postal Vote BD is a clear OTP-not-received scenario.
A 6-digit verification code not arriving is a clean OTP-not-received example for Postal Vote BD.
Security code not arriving in the app is an OTP-equivalent not-received issue.
Self-contained question about a security OTP not arriving in Postal Vote BD and what to do.
Verification PIN not received is close enough to OTP not received in this app context.
Asks what to do when OTP is delayed, which is within the OTP not yet received intent.
Security code not arriving in Postal Vote BD clearly matches the OTP-not-received support intent.
Asks how long to wait and retry when OTP does not arrive, matching the tag.
Canonical clean example asking what to do if OTP does not arrive in the Postal Vote BD app.
Directly asks when to retry after OTP does not arrive in Postal Vote BD.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained questions about OTP, verification, confirmation, security, or one-time codes not arriving or being delayed in the Postal Vote BD app/service. Retry and waiting-time variants remain within the tag’s central not-received OTP intent, and no row clearly belongs better to a sibling tag or is too generic.
